## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` all pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs (README / wiki) updated if behaviour or tools changed
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects published behaviour
- [ ] No secrets logged; stdout untouched (logs go to stderr)
